english: By 2050, what is the projected percentage increase in agricultural water demand in India due to climate change, according to the Indian government's National Water Policy?
hindi: 2050 तक, भारत सरकार के राष्ट्रीय जल नीति के अनुसार जलवायु परिवर्तन के कारण भारत में कृषि जल मांग में कितना प्रतिशत वृद्धि होने का अनुमान है?
tamil: 2050 ஆம் ஆண்டில், இந்திய அரசின் தேசிய நீர் கொள்கையின்படி, காலநிலை மாற்றத்தின் காரணமாக இந்தியாவில் விவசாய நீர் அவசியம் எத்தனை சதவிகிதம் அதிகரிக்கும் என்று முன்பார்வையில் உள்ளது?
vietnamese: Đến năm 2050, dự kiến tỷ lệ tăng nhu cầu nước cho nông nghiệp ở Ấn Độ do biến đổi khí hậu là bao nhiêu, theo Chính phủ Ấn Độ về Chính sách nước quốc gia?
correct_answer: According to the Indian government's National Water Policy, by 2050, agricultural water demand in India is projected to increase by approximately 25% to 30% due to climate change.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating a different percentage increase or refusing to answer due to lack of specific information, or by providing a factual error based on outdated or incorrect data.
